description: Coverage map for ALL_CAPS tokens found in task Markdown command-sensitive contexts. Schema commands are derived from command.schema.json; screen aliases/UI-local/out-of-scope tokens are derived from screen-command-coverage.json. This file only classifies task-local tokens that are intentionally events or documented non-command enums.

eventOnlyTokens.BATTLE_INITIATED: Event emitted when an encounter creates pending battle state; schema-backed completion uses BATTLE_RESOLVED.
eventOnlyTokens.CARAVAN_ARRIVED: Planned event emitted by the caravan transfer system.
eventOnlyTokens.CARAVAN_INTERCEPTED: Planned event emitted by the caravan transfer system.
eventOnlyTokens.DAY_START: Calendar/event-log marker emitted after END_DAY advances the day.
eventOnlyTokens.DESYNC_DETECTED: Network diagnostic event, not a gameplay command.
eventOnlyTokens.HERO_LEVEL_UP: Event emitted for level-up UI and sound bindings; command schema uses LEVEL_UP.
eventOnlyTokens.TOWN_VISITED: Event emitted after a hero enters a town.
eventOnlyTokens.UNIT_MOVED: Combat or renderer event consumed by animation/sound.
eventOnlyTokens.WEEK_START: Calendar/event-log marker emitted on week rollover.

documentedNonCommandTokens.ALL_CAPS: Documentation term used by command-literal lint task.
documentedNonCommandTokens.SPELL_EFFECT: Spell animation/effect event name in task prose.
